MHIVF Overall Organic Performance Dashboard

Blog vs non blog page performance from May 2025 to May 2026. Blog URLs are normalized to clean slug format; non blog URLs retain the path only. May 2026 is partial till 19th, with run rate forecast calculated as actual ÷ 19 × 31 for count metrics.

Priority Optimization View

Filtered priority list with all 13 months. Each month cell includes New Users, Sessions, Engaged Sessions and Avg Engagement Time. Use this as the main URL-level action table.

Overall Month-wise Trend

Bar chart changes with the selected metric. May 2026 bar uses actual value; run rate is shown in the Topic Explorer and tables.

Selected URL Trend

Blog vs Non Blog Monthly Summary

Includes URL field rows for /all-blogs/ and /non-blog-pages/ to keep the summary aligned with the full URL tables.

Month Insight Explorer

Visual Breakdown

Top Movers for Selected Month

Topic Explorer: Month-wise Topic Growth, Drop & Forecast

This section is separate from the main table filters. Select a month and page group/segment to see topic distribution, growth/drop vs previous month, and May 2026 forecast based on run rate.

Topics List

Page Group Summary: Month-on-Month View

Includes All Blogs as one page group, alongside doctors, locations, treatment pages, calculators and other non blog groups.

Blog Topic Areas: Detailed View

Clean topic names only. This is built from URL intent patterns and month-wise traffic movement. Use this for editorial and optimization planning.
